text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part1-3rd:BARRIchestra is the 5th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title is a combination of "Barricades" and "orchestra".

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-3:27) incorporates something similar to the theDOGS chorus motif (0:54-1:23) and the Barricades chorus motif (2:16-2:45). The second part (3:30-5:53) is basically just a slower, more mellow version of 1:23-3:27 in the first part.

All occurrences

Episode 41 - Erwin's trial begins (2nd part)
Episode 46 - Eren attacks Rod Reiss's Titan
Episode 47 - In Kenny's flashback, Uri dies (2nd part)
Episode 49 - Opening recap (2nd part)
Episode 57 - Grisha joins the Restorationists (2nd part)
Special 1 and Episode 89 - Mikasa and Annie talk (2nd part)
Special 2 and Episode 92 - The previous Titans start helping

Navigation
